youtube.com.css: html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; } #secondary { display: none !important; } #primary { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; } #columns { display: block !important; } #player-container { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; } #movie_player { left: 0 !important; }
